signals.raw:
Lakers Defeat Rockets 107-98 in NBA Playoffs Game 1 Despite Missing Luka Dončić and Austin Reaves** | NO | HIGH confidence[3][7]

The Los Angeles Lakers secured a 107-98 victory over the Houston Rockets in their playoff opener, with Luke Kennard scoring 27 points and LeBron James adding 19 points, 13 assists, and 8 rebounds despite absences of Dončić and Reaves; Houston missed Kevin Durant[3][7].
